activities_projects.title: Story Theme Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Understand the central theme of the story
steps: Read the story carefully
Identify the main theme of the story
Discuss how wisdom plays an important role in solving problems
Write a short paragraph explaining the theme
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to identify themes in literary texts
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and understanding of theme (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Trait Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the qualities of the main characters
steps: List the important characters in the story
Write the qualities of each character
Support your answers with examples from the story
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to analyse characters using textual evidence
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of traits and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Event Sequence Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Understand the flow of events in the story
steps: Identify the major events in the story
Arrange them in chronological order
Create a simple timeline of the story events
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct order and completeness of timeline (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Problem and Solution Activity
activities_projects.objective: Recognise conflicts and solutions in the story
steps: Identify the main problem faced by the characters
Explain how wisdom helped solve the problem
Write the problem and solution in a short paragraph
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand conflict resolution in stories
activities_projects.evaluation: Logical explanation of the solution (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Writing
activities_projects.objective: Develop creative writing and communication skills
steps: Choose two characters from the story
Write a short dialogue between them discussing the main problem
Ensure the dialogue reflects their personalities
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to write dialogues based on characters
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and correct dialogue format (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Context Activity
steps: Select five challenging words from the story
Find their meanings using a dictionary
Write sentences using those words in context
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and contextual usage
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence formation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play: Solving the Problem
steps: Form groups of four or five students
Choose a scene where the problem is solved
Act out the scene showing how wisdom helped resolve the issue
Perform it in front of the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve expression and collaborative skills

activities_projects.title: Moral Interpretation
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the lesson conveyed by the story
steps: Discuss the moral of the story with classmates
Write how the lesson can be applied in daily life
Share your ideas in class discussion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to connect literature with real-life situations
activities_projects.evaluation: Relevance and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Scene Illustration
activities_projects.objective: Encourage visual interpretation of the story
steps: Select an important scene from the story
Illustrate the scene using drawings
Write a short caption explaining the scene
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and creativity of illustration (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Reflection Writing
activities_projects.objective: Encourage critical thinking about wisdom and decision making
steps: Think about a real-life situation where wisdom helped solve a problem
Write a short reflection relating it to the story
Share your reflection with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect story themes with personal experiences
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of reflection and clarity (10 marks)
